description: Signal/status active-phase hints, stale detection validation, incident playbooks, synthetic fixtures, and rollout safety checks for Pibo debug telemetry.

userStories.title: Expose compact active telemetry hints in status or signals
userStories.description: As an operator, I want live status to show active phase and stale age hints so that I know whether to inspect telemetry.
acceptanceCriteria: Add active phase, last progress timestamp, stale age, active turn id, and queue depth to the appropriate session status or signal projection when telemetry is available
Signal/status payloads do not include raw provider events, payload previews, headers, transcripts, or full tool arguments
If telemetry is unavailable, status output remains backward-compatible and does not fail
Tests cover active non-stale, active stale, and telemetry-unavailable cases
Tests pass
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Implement read-only stale work detector service
userStories.description: As an agent, I want a stale detector over telemetry so that I can find stuck active work without mutating sessions.
acceptanceCriteria: Implement a stale detector that reads telemetry open phases and active work state using a configurable threshold with a safe default
Detector results include piboSessionId, turnId, phase, staleForMs, lastProgressAt, queue depth when known, and next command metadata
Detector never calls abort, clear, dispose, prune, or any mutating session operation
Tests cover below-threshold active work, above-threshold stale work, missing lastProgressAt, and completed turns
Tests pass
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Add telemetry fixture builders for CLI and service tests
userStories.description: As a QA engineer, I want reusable telemetry fixtures so that command behavior can be tested without live provider calls.
acceptanceCriteria: Add fixture helpers that create a normal completed assistant turn, a partial tool-call/stuck turn, an unknown provider event case, a malformed provider JSON case, and a stale tool execution case
Fixtures populate correlated session, turn, phase, provider request, provider event, tool-call, and optional payload preview records
Fixtures use fake secret values for redaction tests and never require real credentials
Fixture tests prove each fixture can be inserted and queried through the telemetry service
Tests pass
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Validate agent drill-down path from session id
userStories.description: As an AI operator, I want an automated check that the telemetry CLI can diagnose a stuck session in a small number of bounded commands.
acceptanceCriteria: Add a test or scripted fixture that starts with only a piboSessionId from the partial tool-call fixture
Verify the drill-down path reaches the active stale phase using no more than session, turn, provider, and tool command outputs
Verify each command output includes the ids needed for the next command in text or JSON mode
Verify default outputs are bounded and report truncation where applicable
Tests pass
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Add secret-safety validation for telemetry outputs
userStories.description: As a security reviewer, I want tests proving default telemetry outputs do not print secrets or raw payload bodies.
acceptanceCriteria: Add tests that seed telemetry fixtures with fake authorization headers, cookies, bearer tokens, API-key-like strings, OAuth token fields, and secret-like JSON keys
Verify sessions, session, turn, provider, provider events, tool, stale, and stats default outputs do not contain fake secret values
Verify payload preview output contains redacted markers and not raw fake secret values
Verify summary commands do not print full raw provider JSON payload bodies or full tool argument bodies
Tests pass
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Write telemetry incident-debug playbooks
userStories.description: As a maintainer, I want repeatable playbooks so that future incidents are debugged safely and consistently.
acceptanceCriteria: Add documentation for stuck streaming session, partial tool-call args, provider parse error, unknown provider event, stale tool execution, disabled payload preview, and telemetry retention cleanup
Each playbook starts with bounded summary commands before any payload preview command
Playbooks include JSON-mode examples for agents and text-mode examples for humans
Prune playbook shows dry-run before apply and warns about destructive behavior
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Add final observability rollout verification task
userStories.description: As an engineering lead, I want one final verification checklist so that the telemetry feature is complete before production use.
acceptanceCriteria: Add a documented final verification checklist covering npm run typecheck, relevant tests, synthetic stuck-session drill-down, redaction safety, bounded output, stats, prune dry-run, and backward compatibility for existing debug commands
Checklist references the PRD files and source specs for traceability
Checklist states that automatic timeout/recovery work is separate from telemetry observability
Typecheck passes
